message:
fix(fj-lax): use total_cmp for JAX-matching NaN sort order

Use f64::total_cmp instead of partial_cmp for sort comparisons.
This ensures NaN values sort to the end (ascending) or beginning
(descending), matching JAX/XLA IEEE 754 total ordering behavior.

Closes: frankenjax-sort-nan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
